title: In vitro testing of guide RNA efficiency for CRISPR-mediated genome editing
author: Srinidhi Holalu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8zshx6e
materials: HiScribe T7 High Yield RNA Synthesis Kit (NEB E2050S)
Use HiScribe T7 High Yield RNA Synthesis Kit (NEB E2050S)
Move the reaction into 1.5 mL eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Perform DNA extraction using CTAB method...
steps.instruction: Perform DNA extraction using CTAB method or any other methods that you may use routinely for your plant species.

steps.title: Design primers flanking your target PAM sites (NGG)
steps.instruction: Design primers flanking your target PAM sites (NGG). PCR to amplify around 500-600 bp of genomic/gene fragment around the target. Large size templates are easy to resolve on gel electrophoresis.

steps.title: Clean PCR product using Zymo/Bioneer DNA...
steps.instruction: Clean PCR product using Zymo/Bioneer DNA cleanup kit and Sanger sequence to confirm that your PCR amplifications are intended gene. This will also help later for screening indel polymorphisms at PAM site.

steps.title: Design targets for editing target exon(s)...
steps.instruction: Design targets for editing target exon(s) using gRNA design tool ( http://crispr.mit.edu/ or any other portal). The following primers are then used to synthesize the DNA template to prepare gRNA for each target. Oligo design a. Primer 1 (specific for each guide): a) TAATACGACTCCTATAGGG-(20 bp guide sequence)-gtttAagagctaTGCTGgaa b) The three bolded G’s are included in the transcript and required for transcription. If the guide-specific sequence starts with one or more G’s, the same number of bolded G’s can be deleted from the primer. b. Primer 2 (always the same): a) Reverse-gRNA Template: aaaagcaccgactcggtgccactttttcaagttgataacggactagccttatttAaacttgctaTGCTGtttc CAGCAtagctctTaaac

steps.title: Set up reaction in PCR tube
steps.instruction: Set up reaction in PCR tube: 7 µL water (nuclease free) 5 µL NTP mix 10 millimolar (mM) each 2 µL Template DNA (∼ 100 ng — 500 ng ) 1 µL T7 RNA Polymerase Mix Total 15 µL

steps.title: Incubate at 37 °C for 02:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 °C for 02:00:00 .

steps.title: Add 435 µL DNAase/RNAse free water
steps.instruction: Add 435 µL DNAase/RNAse free water.

steps.title: Measure gRNA concentration on nanodrop
steps.instruction: Measure gRNA concentration on nanodrop. Note it down. (May not be accurate, as NTPs may inflate the nanodrop readings).

steps.title: Optional to cleanup using any RNA clean-up kit
steps.instruction: Optional to cleanup using any RNA clean-up kit. Dilute to 10 ng / μL by adding nuclease free water.

steps.title: Set up the following PCR reaction
steps.instruction: Set up the following PCR reaction: 30.5 µL nuclease free water 10 µL 5X Phusion buffer 1 µL 10 millimolar (mM) dNTP 4 µL primer 1 ( 10 micromolar (µM) ) 4 µL primer 2 ( 10 micromolar (µM) ) Always Primer 2 (Reverse-gRNA Template) 0.5 µL Phusion polymerase Total 50 µL

steps.title: Program for PCR
Nano-drop to quantify the PCR product
steps.instruction: Nano-drop to quantify the PCR product. Run a small aliquot of the PCR product out on a gel to check the bands. The resulting band should be 90 bp (very small) and so it is necessary to run a ≥ 3 % agarose gel .

steps.title: Purify the PCR product using Zymo/bioneer DNA cleanup kit
steps.instruction: Purify the PCR product using Zymo/bioneer DNA cleanup kit.

steps.title: Set up reaction (include a negative RNA control)
steps.instruction: Set up reaction (include a negative RNA control): 7.5 µL water (nuclease free) 1.5 µL 10X Cas9 reaction buffer 1.5 µL 300 nanomolar (nM) sgRNA ( 10 ng / μL ) 0.5 µL Cas9 Nuclease Total 11 µL

steps.title: Add 4 µL substrate DNA (∼...
steps.instruction: Add 4 µL substrate DNA (∼ 50 ng — 100 ng total).

steps.title: Incubate 01:00:00 at 37 °C (or...
steps.instruction: Incubate 01:00:00 at 37 °C (or longer up to 01:30:00 ).

steps.title: Denature Cas9 by incubation at 80 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Denature Cas9 by incubation at 80 °C for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Set up a control reaction including...
steps.instruction: Set up a control reaction including all the above ingredients without gRNA. In addition, different ratios of gRNA to Cas9 nuclease can also be setup to replicate the efficiency tests.

steps.title: Prepare 1
steps.instruction: Prepare 1.1 % volume agarose gel.

steps.title: Mix the Cas9 incubated reaction with...
steps.instruction: Mix the Cas9 incubated reaction with 2 µL of loading dye. Load the mixture on gel. If stain was not added during gel preparation, soak gel in staining buffer.

steps.title: Run gel electrophoresis until the ladder...
steps.instruction: Run gel electrophoresis until the ladder resolves and check the cleavage of template DNA under UV illumination.
